current_commit_message: Make into "private" function and rename the arguments to be more in line with the rest of the code.
Add note that the PLI is the signed version, not the unsigned version. This closes issue #14.
Remove blnComputePrxy option because it is unused.
Add global coherence measure to Connectivity class
Need to loop over time and frequency and combine trials and tapers
Fix shapes of returned values in docstring and actually return the global coherences.
Do the division in log space for numerical stability
Adds Dataset with multiple connectivity methods and skips unneeded attributes  (#18)
Use complex instead np.complex because of depreciation
Require environmental variable `SPECTRAL_CONNECTIVITY_ENABLE_GPU` to be set to 'true'  in order to use GPU along with installation of cupy
Fix import, Improve docstring and rename function
Fix import, Improve docstring and rename function
Fix xarray interface and bring back tests
Try to reformat docs and include notebooks
Add more helpful logging for whether GPU and CPU are being used.
Add workaround for syntax highlighting in notebooks
Fix so not cut off on docs
Refactor coherency significance to use n_obs instead of bias
feat(sim): deterministic MVAR via random_state; fix coeff shape docs
fix(connectivity): robust normalization; clamp coherence to [0,1]
feat(api): validate expectation_type with clear error
feat(gpu): raise clear error when GPU requested but CuPy missing
chore(wrapper): actionable errors for unsupported measures
Add explicit random seeds and dtype parametrization to tests
fix(lint): resolve all flake8 and formatting issues
docs(connectivity): add canonical metric ranges; link from README
docs(connectivity): complete Range notes for all connectivity methods
Fix Nyquist bin inclusion for even N FFT lengths
Replace direct matrix inverse with Tikhonov-regularized solve for MVAR Fourier
Fix code formatting and line length issues
Refactor typing to use PEP 604 and improve code clarity
Add input validation for Connectivity fourier_coefficients
feat(T1.2): require 3D input for Multitaper, add prepare_time_series helper
feat(T3.1): add parameter helper functions for guided multitaper analysis
fix: add trailing newline to test file for ruff compliance
Refactor tests to use np.random.default_rng for isolation
test: add comprehensive tests for Nyquist frequency sign fix
Add comprehensive snapshot tests for all Tutorial notebook examples
chore: apply ruff formatting to test_wrapper.py
Fix n_fft_samples docstring to reflect actual behavior
